context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements edge-layer rate limiting for a commerce application using the recommended packages, algorithms, and per-route limits — and whether the 429 response includes proper headers.

checklist.name: Correct rate limit package
checklist.description: Uses @upstash/ratelimit (not express-rate-limit, rate-limiter-flexible, or other alternatives)

checklist.name: Correct Redis package
checklist.description: Uses @upstash/redis (not ioredis, redis, or other Redis clients)

checklist.name: Redis.fromEnv() initialization
checklist.description: Initializes the Redis client using Redis.fromEnv() rather than constructor arguments or connection strings

checklist.name: Edge middleware placement
checklist.description: Rate limiting logic is placed in middleware.ts (Next.js Edge Middleware), not inside individual API route handlers

checklist.name: Sliding window algorithm
checklist.description: Uses Ratelimit.slidingWindow() rather than fixedWindow, tokenBucket, or other algorithms

checklist.name: Catalog route limit
checklist.description: Applies a limit of 100 requests per minute for catalog/product routes (/api/products or /products)

checklist.name: Checkout route limit
checklist.description: Applies a limit of 10 requests per minute for checkout routes (/api/checkout or /checkout)

checklist.name: Search route limit
checklist.description: Applies a limit of 30 requests per minute for search routes (/api/search or /search)

checklist.name: 429 status code
checklist.description: Returns HTTP 429 status code when rate limit is exceeded

checklist.name: X-RateLimit headers
checklist.description: 429 response includes X-RateLimit-Limit and X-RateLimit-Remaining headers

checklist.name: Retry-After header
checklist.description: 429 response includes a Retry-After header with value computed from reset timestamp

checklist.name: Authenticated user exemption
checklist.description: Code or comments indicate that stricter limits apply to unauthenticated requests, or that authenticated users with purchase history receive higher limits

checklist.name: IP-based rate limiting
checklist.description: Rate limit key is derived from the client IP (req.ip or x-forwarded-for header), not from a static value
